nasb.text: “They are insignificant on the surface of the water; Their portion is cursed on the earth. They do not turn toward the vineyards.

esv.text: “You say, ‘Swift are they on the face of the waters; their portion is cursed in the land; no treader turns toward their vineyards.

cnv.text: 這些惡人如水面上飄浮的東西迅速流逝， 他們在世上所得的分被咒詛， 他們不能再走葡萄園的路。

ccb.text: “恶人如水上的泡沫。 他们的产业遭咒诅， 他们的葡萄园荒芜。
